label: Autonomous Decision
description: Decide whether a graph-origin agent loop should use an available skill, request approval, propose a missing skill, or answer directly.

inputSchema.label: Run Origin
inputSchema.description: Run origin used to resolve runPolicies, for example companion.

inputSchema.label: Intent
inputSchema.description: Optional structured intent plan from an upstream agent node.

inputSchema.label: Required Capability
inputSchema.description: Capability that the current task appears to require.

inputSchema.label: Needs Tool
inputSchema.description: Optional explicit boolean. When false, returns answer_directly.

inputSchema.label: Proposed Tool Input
inputSchema.description: Optional input object to pass through for the selected skill.

outputSchema.label: Needs Tool
outputSchema.description: Whether this decision thinks a tool is needed.

outputSchema.label: Tool Input
outputSchema.description: Proposed input to use for the selected skill.

outputSchema.label: Requires Approval
outputSchema.description: Whether execution requires user approval before the next node runs the selected skill.

outputSchema.label: Candidate Skills
outputSchema.description: Discoverable and auto-selectable candidate skills considered.

outputSchema.label: Blocked Candidates
outputSchema.description: Matching skills blocked by readiness or run policy.

outputSchema.label: Missing Skill Proposal
outputSchema.description: Capability proposal when no skill can be autonomously selected.

outputSchema.label: Error
outputSchema.description: Error message when status is failed.
